query: SELECT COUNT(*) as total, category, MIN(damage_multiplier) as min_dmg, MAX(damage_multiplier) as max_dmg, AVG(damage_multiplier) as avg_dmg, MIN(mp_cost) as min_mp, MAX(mp_cost) as max_mp, AVG(mp_cost) as avg_mp FROM game_skill_catalog WHERE is_active = 1 GROUP BY category
